queries.q: Score our Q2 OKRs now that the cycle has closed
Here are the final KR values, baselines, and targets; produce the cycle review with learning synthesis
The quarter ended and leadership wants to know which key results we actually hit and what the evidence says
Grade this completed OKR set, treating committed and aspirational KRs differently
We disagree about whether 0.7 on that KR is good or bad; do an honest scoring pass
Close out the half-year OKR cycle: scorecard, evidence quality, and next-cycle recommendations
The cycle ended early because of the reorg; do a partial-close scoring of our OKRs with interim values
Assess our finished OKRs: did the guardrail hold, and what should we carry into next quarter?
Turn these end-of-quarter KR actuals into a review the team can learn from, with no sugarcoating of misses
Evaluate the completed OKR set and flag any KRs whose measurement window has not closed yet
Help the team draft next quarter's OKRs with outcome-shaped key results
queries.notes: Still drafting; the writer owns drafting and coaching

queries.q: Convert our roadmap items into proper OKRs for the upcoming cycle
queries.notes: Rewrite of a roadmap into OKRs is the writer's Rewrite mode

queries.q: Review this draft OKR set before planning locks: are the KRs measurable and outcome-based?
queries.notes: Pre-cycle draft review is the writer's Audit Only mode, not cycle-close scoring

queries.q: Run the team retrospective for the quarter that just ended
queries.notes: Generic team retro, not OKR scoring

queries.q: Analyze the completed pricing experiment and report whether the treatment won
queries.notes: Single experiment result, not an OKR cycle

queries.q: Write a stakeholder progress update on our OKRs at mid-quarter, no scoring needed
queries.notes: Progress update without scoring is explicitly excluded

queries.q: Bank the big lesson from this OKR cycle into organizational memory
Debug why this cron job runs twice every hour
Write a SQL query computing percent-to-target for each KR row in this table
queries.notes: Unrelated; KR keyword but a SQL task

queries.q: Plan a kid-friendly weekend in Chicago
